nasb.text: Now then let Me alone, that My anger may burn against them and that I may destroy them; and I will make of you a great nation.”

esv.text: Now therefore let me alone, that my wrath may burn hot against them and I may consume them, in order that I may make a great nation of you.”

cnv.text: 現在，你且由得我，讓我向他們發烈怒，把他們消滅；我要使你成為大國。”

ccb.text: 你不要阻止我，我要向他们发烈怒，毁灭他们。我要使你的后代成为大国。”
